---
name: wcag-audit
description: Test fixture — minimal wcag-audit skill
activate_on: accessibility
---

# WCAG Audit (fixture)

- Verify all images have descriptive alt text (WCAG 1.1.1 AA).
- Flag missing form labels as A11Y-WCAG-002.
- Check heading hierarchy is sequential with no skipped levels.
- Report critical when a WCAG 2.2 AA rule is violated.
